mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_record (conversation_id, user_id, role, content, agent_type, create_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{agentType}, NOW())

INSERT INTO ai_chat_record (conversation_id, user_id, role, content, agent_type, create_time) VALUES
(#{record.conversationId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.role}, #{record.content}, #{record.agentType}, NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ai_chat_record WHERE conversation_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_chat_record WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
